nodes.name: Every weekday at 9am
nodes.notes: Runs Mon-Fri at 09:00. Change cron or timezone in Schedule Trigger settings.

nodes.name: Run all enabled discovery sources
nodes.notes: Triggers GetOnBoard + Greenhouse + Lever + Ashby runners. Returns array of run results.

nodes.name: Fetch pending candidates
nodes.notes: Gets all pending_review candidates — human review required before approving.

nodes.name: Format Telegram digest
nodes.notes: Formats a Spanish Telegram message with new candidates and pending review count.

nodes.name: Send Telegram digest
nodes.notes: Requires: Credentials → Telegram API → bot token from @BotFather. Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env var in n8n.
